/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mancurya.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mancurya.dir/src/GLBridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mancurya.dir/src/Environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mancurya.dir/src/Sea.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mancurya.dir/src/FleetManager.cpp.o -o mancurya  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglut.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -lX11
